name: Tomato Cumin Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, purée the tomatoes.
2. Add the egg yolk, jalapeño chile pepper, cilantro, lime juice, mustard, and cumin to the food processor.
3. Blend the ingredients together until the mixture is smooth.
4. With the food processor running on low, very slowly dribble in the oil while continuing to blend.
5. Add the salt and pepper.
6. Makes 2-1/2 cups
